assumptions: Source conflict recorded when top-ranked evidence remains close or non-India-grounded.
conflicts.rationale: Top-ranked sources remain close in score or fail the India-only requirement.
conflicts.recommended_resolution: Prefer the highest-ranked India-grounded source or request analyst confirmation if the score gap remains narrow.
